name: TCS
aboutHiring: TCS hires the largest number of freshers in India annually (~40,000+). They test aptitude, basic coding, and communication. Technical depth matters less than consistency and learning agility. NQT (National Qualifier Test) is the primary entry point.

name: Infosys
aboutHiring: Infosys hires freshers through InfyTQ and campus drives. They focus on logical reasoning, basic programming, and communication. Strong training program at Mysuru campus. Digital specialist track pays higher.

name: Wipro
aboutHiring: Wipro recruits freshers through WILP (Wipro Integrated Placement) and campus drives. They value problem-solving and communication. Elite NTH track offers significantly higher pay for strong DSA performers.

name: HCLTech
aboutHiring: HCLTech hires through TechBee (after 12th), direct campus, and off-campus drives. Fresher roles span engineering services, digital, cloud. Good volume hiring. Interview difficulty is moderate.

name: Cognizant
aboutHiring: Cognizant (CTS) recruits through GenC (fresher program) and campus drives. They test aptitude, communication, and basic tech. Digital/cloud tracks available. Strong focus on client-facing communication skills.

name: Tech Mahindra
aboutHiring: Tech Mahindra hires freshers through campus placements and TechMahindra SMART Academy. Telecom and digital transformation are key focus areas. Interview process is moderate in difficulty.

name: Capgemini
aboutHiring: Capgemini hires freshers through campus and off-campus drives. They run a 'Game-Based Assessment' for aptitude. Strong focus on adaptability, cloud readiness, and communication. Offers good learning programs for freshers.

name: Accenture
aboutHiring: Accenture India is a top recruiter offering ASE (Associate Software Engineer) and specialist roles. They test cognitive ability, coding, and communication. Higher-paying 'specialist' track requires stronger DSA performance.

name: LTIMindtree
aboutHiring: LTIMindtree (merger of L&T Infotech and Mindtree) hires freshers for digital, cloud, and engineering roles. Interview difficulty is moderate. Good reputation for engineering-heavy projects.

name: Mphasis
aboutHiring: Mphasis focuses on BFSI (banking, financial services, insurance) technology. Freshers join through campus or off-campus. Good for students targeting fintech-adjacent backend and data roles.

name: Hexaware
aboutHiring: Hexaware focuses on automation, AI, and cloud. Good entry point for freshers targeting digital transformation projects. Campus hiring in Tier 2 cities is active.

name: Persistent Systems
aboutHiring: Persistent Systems is engineering-focused with good product-adjacent projects. Fresher hiring is campus-driven with a higher bar than typical IT services. Strong for students with solid Java or Python + DSA.

name: Zoho
aboutHiring: Zoho is fully bootstrapped and one of India's most respected product companies. They have a unique hiring process — they don't consider CGPA and hire based purely on problem-solving ability. Very long and challenging coding rounds.

name: Freshworks
aboutHiring: Freshworks is a NASDAQ-listed SaaS company (CRM, helpdesk tools). Good product engineering culture. Freshers join through campus. Strong DSA required for engineering roles.

name: BrowserStack
aboutHiring: BrowserStack is a testing infrastructure product used globally. Small but high-quality hiring. Very strong DSA and system design bar. Excellent engineering culture. Not mass campus hiring.

name: Postman
aboutHiring: Postman is used by millions of developers globally. Strong engineering culture, high bar for freshers. Focus on REST API knowledge (relevant to their product), DSA, and backend fundamentals.

name: Razorpay
aboutHiring: Razorpay is India's leading payment gateway. Strong engineering culture with high bar for freshers. DSA and backend depth are heavily tested. Fintech domain knowledge is a plus.

name: PhonePe
aboutHiring: PhonePe (Flipkart spin-off, Walmart-backed) is India's largest digital payments platform. High engineering bar. Strong DSA and backend skills required. Scale-focused system design is tested even for freshers.

name: CRED
aboutHiring: CRED is known for premium brand and strong engineering culture. Very selective hiring. Strong DSA, system design, and backend depth required. Not a mass recruiter — quality over quantity.

name: Groww
aboutHiring: Groww is India's largest retail investment platform. High engineering culture, strong DSA bar. Backend and data roles are most common for freshers. Fintech and scale-awareness is valued.

name: Zerodha
aboutHiring: Zerodha is India's largest stockbroker and bootstrapped fintech success. Very selective, small team. Strong Python and backend skills valued. No formal campus hiring — mostly project-based and skills-first.

name: Flipkart
aboutHiring: Flipkart (Walmart-owned) is India's largest e-commerce company. Very high engineering bar — on par with top US product companies. Strong DSA, system design, and backend depth. One of the most competitive fresher programs in India.

name: Zomato
aboutHiring: Zomato is a listed company with strong engineering culture. High bar for freshers, especially in backend and data. Known for fast-paced environment and scale challenges (millions of orders/day).

name: Swiggy
aboutHiring: Swiggy (now listed) hires freshers for backend, data, and fullstack roles. Engineering bar is high. Real-time systems and geo-spatial challenges make backend interviews interesting. Strong DSA expected.

name: Meesho
aboutHiring: Meesho is India's largest social commerce platform targeting Tier 2/3 markets. Good engineering culture. Strong DSA and backend bar for freshers. Interesting scale problems in logistics and catalog.

name: Paytm
aboutHiring: Paytm is India's leading payments and financial services company (listed). Moderate engineering bar. Good entry point for students targeting fintech. Backend and data roles are most common for freshers.

name: Juspay
aboutHiring: Juspay powers payments for Amazon, Flipkart, and other giants. Strong functional programming culture (Haskell, PureScript internally). However freshers are evaluated on DSA and backend fundamentals. Very high bar.

name: Zepto
aboutHiring: Zepto is India's fastest-growing quick commerce startup. Very young, fast-moving company. Strong DSA and backend bar. Real-time logistics and inventory systems make for interesting engineering problems.

name: Amazon India
aboutHiring: Amazon India hires for both e-commerce and AWS. One of the hardest fresher processes in India — emphasis on Leadership Principles + very strong DSA + system design. Bar is similar to Flipkart.

name: Microsoft India
aboutHiring: Microsoft hires from top engineering colleges for SDE and data roles. Very strong DSA + system design + OOP concepts. Culture-fit and problem articulation are also evaluated. Among the top 3 most coveted campus companies.

name: Google India
aboutHiring: Google India hires from the very top colleges. Extremely competitive. DSA excellence is non-negotiable. Multiple rounds of tough algorithm and system design questions. CTC is among the highest in India.

name: Adobe India
aboutHiring: Adobe India hires for both product engineering and R&D. Strong DSA and OOP is required. Creative engineering mindset is valued. Unique focus on rendering, media, and document processing systems.

name: Walmart Global Tech
aboutHiring: Walmart Global Tech India (formerly Walmart Labs) is the technology arm of Walmart. Strong engineering bar similar to top product companies. Backend and data roles are most common. Good for students interested in retail tech and scale.

name: Atlassian India
aboutHiring: Atlassian (Jira, Confluence) has a large India engineering presence. Strong engineering culture, good work-life balance reputation. High DSA and system design bar. Good for fullstack and backend engineers.

name: ShareChat / Moj
aboutHiring: ShareChat is India's leading Indian-language social media platform. Good engineering culture with interesting ML and content-serving problems. Moderate to high bar. Good for students targeting social/content tech.

name: Urban Company
aboutHiring: Urban Company is India's leading home services marketplace. Moderate to good engineering culture. Interesting logistics and scheduling problems. Good for fullstack and backend engineers targeting growth-stage startups.

name: Nykaa
aboutHiring: Nykaa (listed) is India's leading beauty and fashion e-commerce platform. Moderate engineering bar. Good for fullstack, frontend, and data engineers. Strong product sense valued alongside technical skills.

name: Chargebee
aboutHiring: Chargebee is a global subscription management SaaS. Strong engineering culture, good product thinking. High bar for freshers. Backend and fullstack roles are most relevant. Good for students targeting B2B SaaS.

name: Darwinbox
aboutHiring: Darwinbox is Asia's fastest-growing HR tech platform. Good engineering culture. Moderate bar for freshers. Backend and fullstack roles available. Good entry point for students targeting enterprise SaaS.

name: CleverTap
aboutHiring: CleverTap is a global customer engagement and retention platform. Good engineering culture with interesting data and analytics challenges. Moderate-to-high bar. Good for backend and data engineers.
